description: Wave 2: Compact faction deep dive. 25 subjects — more ethnicities, body types, ages, civilian vs military, shipboard vs station roles.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

subjects.prompt: heavyset black woman in her 50s with close-cropped grey hair and reading glasses hanging from a chain around her neck, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit with a bright yellow cargo supervisor armband and a heavy data clipboard mag-locked to her thigh, steel-toe boots with deck grip soles, a whistle on a lanyard, the undersuit is stretched tight across broad shoulders from years of physical work that she now supervises instead of doing

thin east asian man in his 30s with precise movements and a calm expression, wearing a steel-blue uniform jacket with navigation department silver piping along the collar and cuffs, a compact star chart tablet in a chest holster, slim-fit uniform trousers, quiet soft-soled shoes because he works on the bridge where silence matters, the jacket is immaculate but not new — he takes care of his things

stocky latina woman in her 40s with burn scars on her neck and forearms, wearing a heavy flame-resistant shipboard suit in dark red-grey with reflective strips on the shoulders and legs, a breathing apparatus slung across her back with the mask hanging at her chest, heavy insulated gloves tucked into a belt loop, mag-lock boots with reinforced ankles, a fire axe in a quick-release holster on her thigh

wiry white man in his late 30s with premature grey hair from radiation exposure, wearing a lead-lined reactor suit in charcoal grey with dosimeter arrays at the collar wrists and waist, thick rubber-soled boots with anti-static grounding strips, heavy rubber gloves with reinforced fingertips, a personal radiation alarm clipped to his chest that everyone pretends not to hear when it chirps

barrel-chested pacific islander man in his 40s with tribal tattoos visible on his forearms below rolled-up sleeves, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit with a high-visibility orange cargo harness over it, a mass-calculation tablet on his wrist like an oversized watch, steel-toe boots, a cargo hook on a belt clip, the harness has weight distribution padding at the shoulders worn smooth from years of heavy lifting

thin pale woman in her late 20s with dark circles under her eyes from watching screens for twelve-hour shifts, wearing a steel-blue uniform shirt unbuttoned at the throat with a signals intelligence department patch, over-ear monitoring headphones permanently around her neck, a cipher key on a chain tucked into her shirt, data tablet in a hip holster, sensible flat shoes, she looks like someone who knows things she is not allowed to talk about

weathered white man in his 50s with a thick grey mustache and hands like leather gloves, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit under an open dark blue watch coat with tarnished brass buttons, a bosun pipe on a lanyard at his chest, a thick leather belt with a multi-tool and flashlight, scuffed boots that have paced every corridor of the ship a thousand times, he is the NCO who actually runs the ship while officers give orders

plump middle eastern woman in her 30s with her hair in a practical bun and reading glasses perched on her nose, wearing a steel-blue uniform blouse with a supply administration patch tucked into regulation trousers, a pen behind her ear and two more in her breast pocket, a thick ring of magnetic access cards on her belt, comfortable regulation shoes, a data tablet in each hand, she controls who gets what on this ship

lean black man in his 40s with greying temples and flight crew insignia on his collar, wearing an olive flight deck coverall with a reflective safety vest over it, ear protection muffs around his neck, heavy heat-resistant gloves hanging from a belt clip, mag-lock boots with orange toe caps, a flight deck comm headset, he marshals shuttle launches and his hand signals mean life or death on the deck

compact muscular woman of mixed race in her 30s with short natural hair, wearing a charcoal ordnance handling suit with bright red warning stripes on the shoulders and arms, anti-static wrist straps on both forearms, padded knees from crawling through weapons bays, steel-toe boots with blast-resistant soles, a toolkit of specialized ordnance tools in a rigid case on her hip, she handles things that explode for a living

tall thin indian woman in her 60s with grey hair in a long braid and bifocal glasses, wearing a cream-ivory medical coat that reaches past her knees over a charcoal undersuit, the coat has a chief medical officer insignia embroidered on the breast pocket, a stethoscope and a neural scanner both hanging from her neck, surgical gloves in every pocket, low-heeled stable shoes, her coat is the cleanest thing on the ship and she keeps it that way deliberately

young muscular latino man in his early 20s with a buzz cut and an earnest expression, wearing a charcoal tactical undersuit with a medical vest in tan with small red cross patches, a compact first aid bag on his right hip, a splint kit on his left, blood-type tags around his neck with his own type stamped on them, combat boots, he is not a doctor he is the guy who keeps you alive until you reach one

petite japanese woman in her 30s with her hair in a tight ponytail and a calm methodical demeanor, wearing a green-grey environmental systems jumpsuit with air quality patches on the shoulders, a portable atmospheric analyzer in a belt holster, a thin respirator mask pushed down around her neck, soft-soled shoes for crawling through ventilation ducts, the jumpsuit has dust from air filtration systems permanently embedded in the fabric

tall broad-shouldered white man in his late 30s with a square jaw and a flat expression, wearing a charcoal armored assault suit with ceramic plate inserts visible at the chest and back, reinforced arm and leg panels, mag-lock combat boots with ankle armor, a compact assault weapon slung across the chest, a combat knife in a boot sheath, a squad leader comm unit on the shoulder, the suit has been repainted twice to cover scoring from energy weapon hits

middle-aged white woman in her 40s with shoulder-length hair and the uncomfortable look of someone who does not belong on a military vessel, wearing civilian travel clothes that stand out against the uniforms around her — a soft grey jacket over a dark blouse, comfortable trousers, low shoes with no mag-locks, a personal bag clutched to her side, she has no patches no insignia no tools just a visitor badge clipped crookedly to her jacket

skinny teenage boy of african descent in his late teens on his first ship assignment, wearing an oversized white galley apron over a charcoal undersuit that is clearly handed down and too long in the arms, rubber kitchen clogs, a towel tucked into his apron string, food prep gloves that are too big for his hands, he stands uncertainly like someone who is still learning where things go

elderly east asian man in his 70s with liver spots and a slight stoop, wearing a worn steel-blue uniform jacket that he still puts on every morning even though he retired fifteen years ago, the rank tabs are gone but the holes where they were pinned are still visible, comfortable civilian trousers underneath, house slippers instead of boots, a data tablet he uses to follow fleet news, living on a station now but the ship never left him

stern white woman in her 40s with her hair pulled back tight and a permanent frown, wearing a steel-blue customs enforcement uniform with a scanner wand holstered at her hip and a cargo seal verification device on her belt, reinforced gloves for handling suspect containers, regulation boots, a badge wallet on a chain around her neck, she looks at everyone like they are hiding something because usually they are

nervous young south asian man in his late teens with too-clean coveralls and brand new tools that have never been used, wearing khaki engineering cadet coveralls with a training insignia on the shoulder, a brand new tool belt where every tool is perfectly aligned, spotless boots, safety glasses on a cord around his neck, the coveralls have not been broken in yet and they creak when he moves, a training manual data pad clutched in one hand

tough black woman in her 30s with cornrow braids and a no-nonsense attitude, wearing a station maintenance jumpsuit in dark grey with a station ID badge, a heavy tool belt with pipe wrenches and sealant applicators, knee pads, mag-lock boots with non-slip soles, a headlamp on an elastic band around her forehead, the jumpsuit is stained with hydraulic fluid and coolant in layers that show years of different spills

fast-talking middle eastern man in his 30s with a crooked smile and too many pockets, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit under an open supply department vest covered in pockets each stuffed with manifests data chits and small trade goods, a hand scanner on a wrist mount, lightweight running shoes instead of boots because he needs speed not grip, a personal comm device jury-rigged to scan cargo tags, he knows where everything is and what everything costs

human male in full medieval plate armor with chainmail, a heraldic tabard, a broadsword and kite shield, standing in front of a castle wall, the armor is polished silver with gold trim and enamel inlays, a plumed helmet under one arm, he looks like he belongs at a Renaissance faire not on a spaceship

young woman with neon blue hair and glowing circuit-pattern tattoos covering her arms, wearing a shiny black PVC bodysuit with chrome buckles and LED-lit accessories, platform boots with transparent soles, holographic jewelry, the outfit screams nightclub not cargo bay, bright neon purple and cyan color palette that violates every color rule in the constitution

attractive young woman in a skin-tight low-cut uniform that emphasizes her figure, with perfectly styled flowing hair and flawless makeup, high-heeled boots, the uniform has been tailored to be form-fitting in ways that would be impractical on a ship, she poses with one hand on her hip, this is cosplay not clothing

enormous man in bulky powered exoskeleton armor covered in imperial eagles and purity seals and gothic cathedral elements, a massive chainsaw sword in one hand and a bolt pistol in the other, every surface is engraved with religious text and skull motifs, a cape flowing behind him, the armor alone weighs more than three normal crew members combined
